title: Gap analysis names current, expected, owner, and proof
query: Our agent keeps writing long chat explanations when I ask it to improve AGI Toy Shop's support workflow. I expected it to write a reusable task artifact with owners and proof steps. Use the gap-analysis workflow before recommending fixes.
reference_points: States the target surface and intended behavior before recommending fixes
Separates observed behavior from expected behavior
Names the current contract or says what evidence is needed to ground it
Classifies gaps across inputs, outputs, proof, composition, or owner boundary
Recommends one next owner surface with a verification path
notes: Tests the core diagnostic path: current versus expected behavior becomes a grounded GapReport, not an immediate fix.

title: Gap analysis preserves unknown expected behavior
query: Something feels off about how AGI Toy Shop agents escalate toy-safety review work. Can you gap-analyze it?
reference_points: Marks expected behavior as unknown or under-specified instead of inventing a target
Identifies the evidence needed to define the intended behavior
Grounds only the supplied observation and known current surfaces
Avoids recommending a concrete fix before the expected behavior is clarified
Returns a next step for gathering or defining the missing expectation
notes: Protects against the skill hallucinating desired behavior when the operator only supplied an observation.

title: Gap analysis checks existing owners before new skills
query: AGI Toy Shop needs a new reusable skill for figuring out why workflows are missing proof. Please propose the new skill.
reference_points: Does not immediately create or recommend a new skill
Checks whether an existing owner such as gap-analysis, eval, harness-advisor, or optimize-harness already covers the behavior
Names the gap in the existing owner if a new surface might still be needed
Recommends consolidation, owner edit, or proof path before duplication
Keeps the decision inside clean-room AGI Toy Shop context without touching live repo files
notes: Catches duplicate-skill drift before remediation creates another owner for the same harness job.
